---
title: "Contact"
description: "Public contact links for Jiho Min."
---

::: {.site-shell .page-shell}
::: {.page-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Contact
:::

# Let’s connect.

For privacy, this page only includes public contact links and placeholders. No phone number, address, school details, or private schedule information is listed here.
:::

::: {.contact-grid}
::: {.contact-card}
### Email

[hello@example.com](mailto:hello@example.com)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### GitHub

[github.com/jiho-m0521](https://github.com/jiho-m0521)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Website

[mjiho.com](https://mjiho.com)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Social links

Optional public social links can be added here later.
:::
:::
:::
